CustomField.description: Check to manually send the "FINAL REQUEST Additional Information/Documents Requested by..." reminder email. Make sure to update the "Document Request Due" and "Document Request Due Time" fields before checking.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check to manually send the "FINAL REQUEST Additional Information/Documents Requested by..." reminder email. Make sure to update the "Document Request Due" and "Document Request Due Time" fields before checking.
CustomField.label: Send Final Document Corrections Reminder
